key_threats: 6 wins from 9 — identical record to WW in Group C, strong all-round side
Positive NRR (+0.56) means they win by margins — disciplined batting and bowling
7th in a 19-team Group B — one of the stronger mid-table sides
key_weaknesses: 3 losses show they can be beaten — they have gaps to exploit
Their NRR (+0.56) is slightly below WW's comparable metric, suggesting WW may have the edge
Away from their home ground — travel and unfamiliar conditions may affect performance

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Full bowling arsenal — Pradhan, Rajpurohit, Tyagi all need to bowl their full quotas. Don't let them settle in the powerplay. United Falcons are likely to bat aggressively early.
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Critical swing game. Win the toss and assess — both batting and chasing are viable. Protect wickets in the first 6 overs regardless.
